title: How is it to be taken
display_title: How is it to be taken
wikitext:
[]: How is it to be taken             Quote Post by Cesternino53 » Fri Dec 01, 2006 2:15 am Okay, first of all I'm new here. This is obviously the best Eva source on the net so it's great to be here. My question is this: These new movies are certainly something to be excited about. If they end up being continuations, obviously any information gleaned can be applied to the original series. However, if they are retellings/recaps can we really use the information to understand the original series better or should we treat these movies as something entirely new? If you don't get what I mean, take the manga. It is it's own seperate story, and I think we all agree that anything learned there can only be applied to that story. Personally, I believe that if the story is not a new chapter to the saga (not a continuation, which I would perhaps like better) we should treat it as a seperate entity. So essentially we would have three "main" Eva stories; the original, the manga, and this. Again, great to be here.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Dec 01, 2006 11:46 am That's the excuse people are using, trying to write off The Compilation of Final Fantasy VII as an unimposing spinoff. But I don't think it matters what kind of entity we classify it as; should their attempt at reimagining Eva fail miserably (which is a high probability), then ALL of Eva turns to shit. On the bright side tho; having no expectations helps. You can only either sink into further resignation or be pleasantly blown away. EDIT: 'sup

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Dec 01, 2006 12:08 pm I believe there's a canonical clause. If Rebuild shows things which couldn't have happened in Eva original (much as what happens with Kaworu in the manga, shows up when during the TV series would have been impossible), then it's going to be EIAO (Eva in Appearance Only). Alternate Universe or whatever, but never canon. I really don't have any faith in Gainax anymore. Been watching too much animÃ©, new and old, Gainax and other, and the trends are worrysome. Loli princesses doing magical girl transformations to beat the Angels? ...Do not want... but hell, that's what Gainax has been giving us almost since after FLCL. You say Anno, Sadamoto... can't be that bad. I say, they're both pricks (at least they seem so in the interviews). And like the Pistols, they're coming back for your money. Those are my expectations, hope they don't come true.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 01, 2006 1:47 pm AchtungAffen wrote: Loli princesses doing magical girl transformations to beat the Angels?

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Dec 01, 2006 2:11 pm Sorry, I just never read fanfiction on principle. @AchtungAffen; What's that word again? Re........ *Checks it up on wikipedia* Can't find it. Re-something, I hear it was first used in Star Trek. Deviating from continuity, that sorta thing? Someone probably know this, I learned of it at the same time as fanwanking.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 01, 2006 2:12 pm Kaysow wrote: Sorry, I just never read fanfiction on principle. @AchtungAffen; What's that word again? Re........ *Checks it up on wikipedia* Can't find it. Re-something, I hear it was first used in Star Trek. Deviating from continuity, that sorta thing? Someone probably know this, I learned of it at the same time as fanwanking.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Dec 01, 2006 2:15 pm I love retcons because they generally cause more continuity errors, LOL.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Fri Dec 01, 2006 4:00 pm Yeah, that's it. It's total bullshit. Sephiroth was TOSSED into Lifestream by Cloud, he didn't fucking jump in willingly.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Fri Dec 01, 2006 6:25 pm Kaysow wrote: Yeah, that's it. It's total bullshit. Sephiroth was TOSSED into Lifestream by Cloud, he didn't fucking jump in willingly.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Fri Dec 01, 2006 6:46 pm AuthenticM wrote: Kaysow wrote: Yeah, that's it. It's total bullshit. Sephiroth was TOSSED into Lifestream by Cloud, he didn't fucking jump in willingly.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Dec 02, 2006 6:13 am That's it, yes. Last Order, a cel-animated OVA that came as a bonus with the mandatory-overpriced-first-edition in Japan. Also, keeping true to the ending of the game; mankind shouldn't even exist anymore. That IS up for discussion, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Dec 03, 2006 1:47 am The Bastard King wrote: He was making a reference to the "Last Order" segment, which does a bit of a job with the Nibelheim story. Cloud throws Sephy against a wall, then he decides to jump in for God knows what reason when Cloud is clearly at the disadvantage (aka sword in stomache).

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sun Dec 03, 2006 9:15 am I dunno what's going on with Crisis Core, but the people over at FFWA (I was banned permanently, but that was 5 years ago and I'm re-registered) who have read the script or something are telling us to be prepared for some sick retconning.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Dec 03, 2006 11:08 pm Kaysow wrote: I dunno what's going on with Crisis Core, but the people over at FFWA (I was banned permanently, but that was 5 years ago and I'm re-registered) who have read the script or something are telling us to be prepared for some sick retconning.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:02 am Can we get back to Rebuild, and off the Final Fantasy side-track. Thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:11 am How is it to be taken?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Mon Dec 04, 2006 2:27 am well if Hideaki is directing them...then i think that automatically makes them canon also hes said that hes doing this cuz new technology is allowing him to make Eva "the way it was meant to be"... so i think that this would mean that the movie's canonness trumps that of the original show doesnt it?

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Dec 04, 2006 8:14 am master0rolando wrote: well if Hideaki is directing them...then i think that automatically makes them canon also hes said that hes doing this cuz new technology is allowing him to make Eva "the way it was meant to be"...

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Mon Dec 04, 2006 1:01 pm How is it to be taken

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Mon Dec 04, 2006 1:30 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Can we get back to Rebuild, and off the Final Fantasy side-track. Thank you.
